yo maile lagAeko sabaibhanda Ramro DijAina gareko ra ArAmadAyI brA madhye ek hunuparCha! 36DD sAijakI mahilAko rUpamA, Ramro saporTa mAtra nabhaera strIliMgI ra sundara pani bhaeko kunai chIja phelA pArna dherai garo Cha. yo brA DijAinarale bhArI stana bhaeko mahilAko AvashyakatAharU bujhdaCha. sabaibhanda pahile, tinIharUle tapAIMlAI thorai taula baDhAune vA taula ghaTAune kramamA tapAIMko brA pUrNa rUpamA phiTa huna anumati dinako lagi atirikta huka ra A.NkhA brA sTryApa eksaTenDara dinChan. yo byAnDa ramro sanga phiTa nabhaekole DhADako boso sirjana hune Chaina. sTryApaharU kA.NdhaharUmA narama rUpamA pyADa garek Chan, tyasaile dinako antyamA tapAIMko kA.NdhamA tI rAto sTryApa chinhaharU ChoDnamA kunai pani kurAle bAdhA pur{}yAu.Ndaina. brAko anDaravAyara samarthita kapaharUle pUrNa kabhareja dinCha ra sabai kurAlAI sahI uchAi ra ThAu.NmA rAkhnako lagi utkRRiShTa samarthana pani dinCha. tinIharU ArAma ra lukAunako lagi halkA rUpamA lAina garek Chan ra lesa ra bo eksenTaharU dherai strIliMgI Chan. tapAIMko lugAbATa kehi pani dekhi.Ndaina ~ kapaharUmA lesa obharale pani. malai vishvAsa Cha ki mero lagi yo ek uttama phiTa thiyo - yo dherai thulo vA dherai sAno chaleko thiena. ma pakkai pani yI brAharUle bharieko darAja chAhanchu, kinaki ma vyaktigata rUpamA yo brA bhanda Ramro banayeko, uchita mulya vA Ramro phiTa bhaeko kehi mAgna sakdina. maile mero imannudAra ra niShpakSha rAyako badalAmA yo utpadan chuTamA prapta gare.

Ramro sAno spikara. jaDAna kAyama rAkhCha ra yesko vishiShTatAharU anurUpa guNastara Cha. Ramro sAno spikara.

tyahA.N 60 pajalaharU Chan, kaThinAIko 5 DigrImA samUhabaddha, sTArTara, juniyara, visheShaj~na, mAsTara ra vijArDa., pratyekm 12 pajalaharU Chan. khela rasha Avara jastai dekhinCha..tara sTeroiDaharUmA. pajalaharU sTArTarabATa vijArDamA jA.NdA ma kaThinAI staralAI 2,4,6,8 ra 10 ko rUpamA mulya~Nkana garnechu. udAharaNakA lagi, sabaibhanda kaThina sTArTara pajala, # 12 lAI samAdhAna garna 26 chAlaharU chAhinCha, visheShaj~na pajala # 36 lAI 32 chAlaharU chAhinCha ra vijArDa pajala # 60 lAI samAdhAna garna 123 chAlaharU chAhinCha.

rAjAsanga DarAvanI upanyAsaharU lekhne prAkRRitika (Sayad alaukika) pratibhA Cha. tyo sabailAI thAhA Cha. dherai mAnisaharUlAI ke thAhA Chaina uhA.N hamro pustak mahAn lekhakaharU madhye ek hunuhunCha jasale vidhAlAI samIkaraNabATa bAhira nikAldai hunuhunCha. maile ahile samma ramAilo gareko dui TAimalainamA uphrane upanyAsa maile kahilyai paDheko Chaina. rAjAle yasalAI sahaja ra taralatApUrvaka garchan. sAthai katha AphaimA yati avashoShita Cha ki malai harek rAta yo pustak tala rAkhna garo bhayo. bAlyakAla ra bAlyakAlako Dara dui chIjaharU hun juna rAjAle utkRRiShTa garchan ra yo katha kunai apavAda Chaina. yuvA pAtraharU turuntai jIvanamA Au.NChan. pratyeklAI chitraNa garna sajilo Cha. tI sabaisanga, yo Sayad maile paDheko sabaibhanda DaralAgdo upanyAsa ho. euta upanyAsa dimAgamA Au.NCha juna yasalAI DarAune vibhAgamA Trampa gardaCha ra yo rAjA hoina. yo atyantai DaralAgdo thiyo kinabhane yasale bAlyakAlako DaralAI mAtra nabhaI hAmI sabaisanga sambandhita huna sakCha, tara thulo anupAtako kharAbIsanga pani vyavahAra garyo. ho, yo pustak lAmo Cha tara yo katha nirmannu garna pratyek anuchCheda Avashyaka Cha. varNana garejhaiM, yo sAno penguina bachchAko lagi ek uttama chintAmukta plasha khelaunA ho. malai kunai pani baTana, gilAsako A.NkhA, plAsTikakA TukrAharU, Adi chapAera khAine bAre chintA linu pardaina, ra sAno AkAra surakShita, ArAmadAyI ra DhuvAnIko lagi pani sajilo Cha. mero bachchAlAI yo mannu parCha.

tyasaile, surumA malai yo kurA mannu parena. maile yo mero Oceanic Biocube 29 HQI ko lagi kineko thie.N ra maile yesko lagi Ramro ThAu.N phelA pArna sakina. maile Disple bhAga prayas gare, tara Aqualifter 0 mineTa bhitra stara sahI rUpamA bharna paryApta shaktishAlI thiena, ra pAnIko stara kamtimA dui senTimiTara parivartana hunu aghi yo kika garna pani sakina. malai lagyo ki yo bekra Cha. tyasapaChi, maile sensaralAI tesro chembaramA sthAnAntaraNa gare. mero Tunze 9001 ko sAtha, yo antima chembaramA sanchai TAiTa Cha, tara yo phiTa hunCha ra yo nirdoSha rUpamA kam gardaCha. pAnIko stara aba dinamA dui paTaka mAthi uThAinCha ra mero lavaNatA 35 ppt mA pUrNa rUpamA aDkieko Cha. malai yasamA kunai truTi bhaeko Chaina ra malai niyantrakam samAvesha dherai 'surakShA' suvidhAharU mannu parCha.

krimasana ibha, brAnDilina kolinsako kyAnara lek shRRi~NkhalAko tesro pustak, mero TBR sTyAkam kehi samayadekhi Cha.  maile kehi samayaaghi bhAileTa Dana (mero buka klabadvArA vAileTa Dana upanAma) ra embara morna paDhe.N, tara yo upanyAsa suru gardA harAeko thiena.  vAstavamA, tinIharU sambhavataH sTyAnDa-alonako rUpamA padhna sakinCha, tara ma surumA suru garna chAhanchu.  upanyAsa dauDana suru hunCha ra vAstavamA kahilyai ChoDdaina.  kArlA reDali~Na ek hiTa manche thandachu lakShita Cha ra kasaile kina unako mRRityu chAhanCha bhanera nishchita Chaina.  unI shAbdika rUpamA surakShAmA Thakkara khAnChin, tara bhAgdA, unI kasalAI vishvAsa garne bhanera kahilyai pakkA huna sakdainan.  katha vartamannu dinako kArya ra kArlAko 16 varSha purAno DAyarIbATa DAyarI praviShTiharU mArphata prakaTa hunCha.  dui bIchako svichale vAstavamA kam gardaCha ra pAThakaharU bhramita hu.Ndainan. adhyAyaharUko shIrShamA miti praviShTiharU ra DAyarIko lagi pharaka phanTako lagi dhanyavAda.  krimasana ibha Ramro Cha, ChiTo paDhnuhos yedi tapAi.N pRRiShTha ghumAune saspensa khojdai hunuhunCha bhane.

ma yo chalchitra ko bAremA tyati utsAhita thiina.N. ma dherai eksanako apekchya gariraheko thie.N ra antya pani naRamro thiena. antya ali anumannu garna sakine khAlako thiyo, tara yo ekdamai Ramro thiyo. malai thAhA thiena ki yo chalachitra yati ramro sanga lekhieko ra abhinaya gareko huneCha. abhinaya utkRRiShTa thiyo. katha ramro sanga bhanieko thiyo ra sthAnaharU sundara thie. kAsha ma chalchitra ko dherai bhAga herna saktheM. ma yo chalachitra ra yesko lagi Ramro mulya pAu.NdA khusi thie.N. malai thAhA thiena ki shRRi~NkhalA kasarI samApta bhayo, tara ma khusi chu ki yo radda bhayo. maile yo mero ChorAko lagi kinekomA dherai ramAilo gare. usalAI yo mannu parCha! malai yo chalachitra mannu parCha. maile yasalAI kehi paTaka hereko chu ra yasalAI dherai mannu paryo. yo ek utkRRiShTa chalachitra ho. merI ChorI ra maile yo sangai heryauM. malai thAhA Chaina yo chalachitra kasarI samApta bhayo. malai yo mannu paryo. maile yo merI ChorIko lagi kineko thie.N ra malai lagyo ki yo Ramro thiyo, tara unale yo sanchai mannu parAin. tyasaile, unale yo kinin.

malai yo utpadan sanchai mannu parCha. yo Ramro gunastar ko Cha ra dherai sAnA miraralesa kyAmerAharUsanga kam garneCha (sonIko mAtra hoina). maile yasalAI mero 18.5 mimI lensa bhaeko Nikon V1 ra 45 mimI lensa bhaeko Olympus E-PL3 mA safalatApUrvaka prayoga gareko chu. mero sAthIle Aja Aphno Olympus OMD mA yo prayas garyo ra yo pani phiTa bhayo. kesalAI AphaiMmA banda rAkhna lensa prayoga garne tarikAlAI dhyAnamA rAkhdai madhyama AkArako lensa bhaeko sAnA miraralesa kyAmerAharUmA kesa ramro sanga kam garneCha. yedi tapAIM Aphno kyAmerAlAI dherai ThAu.N naliI arko jholA vA byAkapyAka bhitra surakShita rAkhna chAhanuhunCha bhane kyAmerA pyAmpara vichAra garna nahichakichAunuhos.

maile tIna kAryaharUkA lagi pro iyaraharU kharida gare - shUTiMga, dhanuSha shikAra, ra yArDa varipari kam. ahilesamma tInavaTaimA Ramro pradarshana garek Chan . shUTiMga shora prabhAvakArI rUpamA rokieko Cha ra ma dAyarAmA sAmAnya kurAkAnI garna sakchu. jaba ma dhanuShako shikAra garchu, ma bholyuma baDhAuna sakchu tAki ma jaMgalamA harek AvAja sunna sakchu. ma vAstavamA tini haru lai sabaibhanda badi ghA.Nsa kATne ra chalAune ra pAta bloara prayoga garchu. ma kam gardA mero mannuparne kAryakramaharU sunna mero ipod vA iphone jaDAna garchu. samagramA guNastara utkRRiShTa Cha ra malai AshA Cha ki yasale maile ChoDeko sunuvAi surakShita garneCha.

yI sanchai ArAmadAyI Chan. ma sAija 12 lagAu.Nchu ra yI ekdamai phiTa hunChan. mero khuTTA chauDA ra khuTTA chauDA Cha. phiTa ekdamai Ramro Cha ra sAija anusAra phiTa hunCha. malai yo mannu paryo. maile XS sAija arDara gare,

maile AshA gare...ra AshA gare...ra yo utpadanlAI vibhinna saMyojana ra AkAraharUmA prayas gare. mero grenAiTa TapaharUmA, yo pUrNa rUpamA asafala bhayo, TA.Nsine avasheShaharU bAhek juna Tikeko Cha. merA duvai chaDhne birAlAharU (birAlokA bachchAharU hoinan), TA.Nsine sAmannuharUko vAstA garenan. mero mukhya jamparale vAstavamA Tepa chATdai rahyo. samIkShAkA kAraNa kapaDAko pharnicharamA yasalAI prayas garne jhanjhaTa garina. yo sAmannuko $50 Tepa garepaChi, yo bekra Cha. Sayad ThUlA birAlAharUko lagi, tara pheri, tinIharU sAnA birAlAharU jastai hAma phAldainan (mero gharamA birAlokA bachchAharU hoinan).
malai yI buTaharU mannu parChan. yI dherai ArAmadAyI Chan ra ma dinabhari lagAuna sakchu.

dherai amerikIharU Aja vishvale sAmannu garirahek vittIya samasyaharUbAre anabhij~na Chan.  hAmI sabai ustai ChauM bhanne sochne prabala pravRRitti Cha.  mahAna amerikI krAntiko mUla vichAra karoDapatiharUko rAShTra banAunu thiyo.  dhanako dhAraNA mithaka mAtra hoina mahAna rAShTrako AdhAra pani ho.  natijAko rUpamA, dherai mAnisaharU saMyukta rAjyamA sampattiko mahattvako bAremA anajAna Chan.  lekhakale sampattiko niShpakSha dRRiShTikoNa prastuta garne prayas garek Chan.  pustak amerikI krAntimA ruchi rAkhne jo kohIko lagi atyadhika siphArisa gareko Cha. yo ek utkRRiShTa pustak ho.  yasamA dherai jAnakArI Cha.  ma yasalAI arUlAI siphArisa garchu. yo pustak ek mahAna pustak thiyo. maile yasalAI ramAilo gare ra ali nirAsha bhae.N. yo ChiTo paDhne ho ra
